title: Baked Necessities
description: Open the bakery of your dreams, with the Baked Necessities - Food Datapack. Unlock access to 15+ custom baked goods, new crafting recipes, new decorative blocks, quests, workstations, and the functional register block.
body:
# **Feed Your Appetite**

Open the bakery of your dreams with the Baked Necessities Vanilla+ Minecraft datapack. This data pack aims to enhance the players Vanilla experience by adding in 15+ custom baked goods, new crafting recipes, new decorative blocks, quests, workstations, and the functional register block that will bring your bakery to life. Fancy a Small Multiplayer experience? This data pack is Realm compatible!

The Main Focus of this Data pack is to expand upon vanilla ingredients currently in the game, emphasizing on unique sweet treats. This pack features a large variety of baked goods from brownies to exotic candies granting players powerful abilities. Those seeking a new way to make emeralds can now open a Bakery and sell your newly acquired Baked Goods to villagers using the Sweet Box Mechanic. Furthermore, villagers actually acquire the items they purchase from your Bakery and use them similar to Carrots, Bread, Potatoes, and Wheat.

## **What it Adds**
- 15+ Baked Goods
- Functional Bakery Block - Open a Bakery
- New Decorative Blocks
- New Villager Mechanics - Help Villagers Populate with Baked Goods.
- New Workstation (Prep Table)
- Quests (Sweet Deals)
- Expanded Usage for Vanilla Ingredients (Cocoa Beans, Chorus Fruit, Honey Bottles, etc.)
- SMP/Realms Friendly
- 1.21.11 Compatible
- No Optifine Needed - Plug and Play Pack

## Realms/SMP Friendly
This data pack is Realms compatible! If you fancy a multiplayer experience, create a single player world and add the data pack to it. Once it is created, upload the world to your realm and you are good to go!

Server Load: Low Impact

**Note: In order for your friends to experience the magic of the data pack, everybody needs to have the Resource Pack enabled and selected.**

## How to Install - Easy to Install Resource Pack
- Download the Resource Pack
- Open Minecraft Launcher >> Launch Game
- At Main Menu >> Select Options
- Select Resource Packs >> Open Pack Folder >> Drag the Zipped BN_resource file into this folder.
- Close the File Browser >> Toggle the file so that it is under the **Selected** Column.
- Good to Go! Have Fun!
- Proceed to Data Pack step below (Host/Single-Player only needs to do the Data Pack step below).

## How to Install - Easy to Install Data Pack
- Download the Data pack
- Open Minecraft Launcher >> Launch Game
- At Main Menu >> Select Single Player >> Create New World >> More Tab
- Select Data Packs >> Open Pack Folder >> Drag the Zipped BN_data file into this folder.
- Close the File Browser >> Toggle the file so that it is under the **Selected** Column.
- Good to Go >> You can now hit Create New World.
